calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between J. Baptiste And Peachtree Settlement Funding, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code Sec. 10134, Set. Seq.
Off Calendar Aug-27-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Kim Pomerantz, Esq. 818-382-6200 of G&B Law for Petitioner.
Juanita Baptiste, transferor.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court calls Line #2-CPF-20-517050, Line #3-CPF-20-517122, Line #4 CPF-20-517135 and Line #18-CPF-517135 concurrently. The Court raises concerns and questions Counsel. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER PEACHTREE SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between J. Baptiste And Peachtree Settlement Funding, Llc, Pursuant To California Insurance Code Sec. 10134, Set. Seq.

The Court tentatively approves the petition as amended, conditioned upon the receipt of the amended requests and signed documentation from J.G Wentworth and Ms. Ba[ptiste. Petitioner to submit all documents to contestdept302tr@sftc.org (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
